bleeding.name: Bleeding
bleeding.description: Each strike tears deeper into flesh, building toward a catastrophic hemorrhage. When the blood loss reaches critical levels, the wound erupts in a fountain of crimson, dealing massive burst damage.

frostbite.name: Frostbite
frostbite.description: A creeping cold gnaws at the enemy with every blow, ice crystallizing beneath the skin. When the frost reaches the bone, it shatters outward in a frozen explosion, dealing burst damage and leaving the victim sluggish and weakened.

poison.name: Poison
poison.description: A vile toxin seeps into the bloodstream with each wound, corrupting from within. Once saturation is reached, the venom erupts through the veins, inflicting agonizing damage over time as organs begin to fail.

burn.name: Burn
burn.description: Embers burrow into the enemy's flesh with every strike, smoldering beneath the surface. When the heat reaches a critical mass, the accumulated fire detonates in a violent conflagration that chars flesh to the bone.

paralyze.name: Paralyze
paralyze.description: Crackling energy courses through the enemy with each blow, overloading nerves and seizing muscles. When the voltage peaks, a devastating shock locks the body rigid, rendering the victim unable to act.

corruption.name: Corruption
corruption.description: Dark energy festers in the wounds, an abyssal rot that eats away at steel and resolve alike. Once the corruption takes hold, the enemy's armor crumbles and dissolves, leaving nothing but exposed, vulnerable flesh.

lightning.name: Lightning
lightning.description: Static charge accumulates with every strike, the air growing thick with the scent of ozone. When the storm breaks, a blinding arc of lightning leaps from the target to all nearby foes, leaving scorched ruin in its wake.

weaken.name: Weaken
weaken.description: A cursed miasma seeps from each wound, draining vitality and will to fight. When the affliction fully takes root, the enemy's strikes become feeble and desperate, their strength sapped by an invisible, gnawing hunger.

drain.name: Drain
drain.description: Each wound opens a channel between souls, a parasitic tether that grows stronger with every blow. When the connection is complete, life force rips free from the victim in a torrent of dark light, mending the attacker's wounds.

holy_fire.name: Holy Fire
holy_fire.description: Sacred flames kindle within the blade, fed by righteous fury and ancient prayer. When the divine fire ignites, it erupts in a pillar of purifying radiance — a cleansing blaze that burns far fiercer against the unholy and the monstrous.
